global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting travel options with flexible booking.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large abstract shape in the center, possibly a combination of circles and rectangles in a light green color.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape overlapping the central graphic, also in light green, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A tiny circular shape located towards the bottom, contributing to the overall abstract theme.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Dream destinations await' positioned centrally, conveying the main offer.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: Prominent green text at the top reading 'DriftPass', indicating the brand identity.

elements.label: Additional message
elements.description: Smaller black text below the main message stating 'Flexible booking options', providing more details.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like text 'Learn more' in black, positioned at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, DriftPass, Dream destinations await, Flexible booking options.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The brand name is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
